_comment: MCP servers auto-loaded by Claude Code when it opens this project. Claude Code reads .mcp.json at SessionStart. Projects can add more by running `claude mcp add <name> -- <cmd>`. Kit ships three by default -- see docs/concepts/onboarding-flow.md.

context7._comment: Upstash Context7 -- fetches current docs for fast-moving libraries. Required by context7-suggest.py PreToolUse hook which blocks edits to flagged-library files without a recent docs lookup.

firecrawl._comment: Firecrawl -- scrape/crawl pages for @spec-enricher and research-bootstrap. Requires FIRECRAWL_API_KEY in env (run ai-dev-kit connect to set it).

playwright._comment: Playwright MCP -- browser verification for the Evaluator subagent when agent-browser isn't installed. Headless Chrome; no env keys required.
